permission_classes.description: Search, fetch, inspect, and summarize without changing external state.
Generate content locally without an external side effect.
Create a reversible draft, branch, issue, document, or configuration.
Publish, submit, approve, or otherwise finalize work on an external system.
Sign, deploy, transfer, spend credits, or invoke a paid external action.

credential_classes.label: No secret
credential_classes.default_behavior: Enable public and local workflows without asking the user to connect an account.

credential_classes.label: Scoped API token
credential_classes.default_behavior: Request only when a named read task needs higher limits or private data.
credential_classes.storage_policy: Use encrypted server-side storage or a local environment variable; never place the token in prompts, URLs, logs, or frontend state.

credential_classes.label: OAuth connection
credential_classes.default_behavior: Prefer read-only, short-lived scopes and show the requested permissions before connection.
credential_classes.storage_policy: Encrypt refresh tokens server-side and support revocation.

credential_classes.label: Organization service identity
credential_classes.default_behavior: Use only for an organization-owned integration with an explicit resource boundary.
credential_classes.storage_policy: Keep in an organization secret manager with rotation, audit logs, and least-privilege policy.

credential_classes.label: Paid API credential
credential_classes.default_behavior: Use a platform-owned allowance first and disclose cost before user-funded or overage actions.
credential_classes.storage_policy: Encrypt server-side, apply quotas and spending limits, and keep secrets out of job payloads.

credential_classes.label: External wallet session or delegated signer
credential_classes.default_behavior: Keep disabled until the user approves a specific action, network, asset, and maximum amount.
credential_classes.storage_policy: Never ingest a private key or seed phrase. Use external signing, short-lived delegated sessions, or an isolated development wallet.
